description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the master branch. The workflow has four jobs: product, docs, demo, and integration. The product job checks out the repository, sets up Python, downloads Android Python builds, installs requirements, builds the product, and uploads the Maven repository. The docs job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs requirements, and builds the documentation. The demo job depends on the product job, downloads the Maven repository, gets a keystore, and builds the demo. The integration job depends on the product job, runs on a matrix of OS and AGP versions, and tests the integration.
